title: lactuca scariola var. lactucarii
intro: Lactuca scariola var. lactucarii, commonly known as prickly lettuce or wild opium lettuce, is a variety of the Lactuca scariola plant, belonging to the sunflower family Asteraceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbalism, as it contains alkaloids such as lactucarium, which has sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lactuca scariia var. lactucarii include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, relieve insomnia, and ease pain. Herbal preparations of Lactuca scariola var. lactucarii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and provide natural relief from various health issues.
